Metadata.title: Julia Walczak — Architecture Portfolio
Metadata.description: Architecture portfolio. Design of public spaces, private gardens, and small architectural objects.

Hero.heading: Architecture Portfolio
Hero.subtitle: Landscape architecture
Hero.description: Work spanning the design of public spaces, private gardens, and small architectural objects.

AboutContact.aboutText: I am a landscape architecture student at the Poznań University of Life Sciences. My work spans multiple scales, from public spaces and utility buildings to private gardens.

park-komunikacyjny.title: Park circulation layout
park-komunikacyjny.description: Pedestrian and cycling paths, parking, and ramps for people with disabilities. A park bench design with spaces for people with disabilities.

sauna-lesna.title: Forest sauna
sauna-lesna.description: A hemispherical structure integrated into a forest setting. The design is complemented by plantings and a water basin.A physical scale model was produced as part of the project.

ogrod-przydomowy.title: Residential garden
ogrod-przydomowy.description: Conceptual and executive design. Terrace, wooden patio, herb zone, fountain. 36 plant species.
